zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Philip, Lord Cilsant Phillipes於1415年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾時，他的父親Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip35歲，母親Gwendolena Verch Evan40歲。他和Jonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Hen至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。他去世在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Phillipes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish and Dutch: variant of   Phillips  .

variants.name: Phillips
meanings: English, Dutch, North German, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name   Philip  . In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages (see   Philips  ).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Philip,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Lorraine   or variant spelling of   Laurie .

variants.name: Lorraine
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin denoting a migrant from the province of Lorraine in eastern France. This derives its name from Latin Lotharingia ‘territory of the people of Lothar’. The latter is a Germanic personal name derived from hlud ‘fame’ + heri, hari ‘army’. Lorraine began to be used as a girl's name in Scotland in the 19th century, and for a time in the second half of the 20th century enjoyed great popularity, which has since waned.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Philip, Lord Cilsant Phillipes was born in 1415, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip, was 35 and his mother, Gwendolena Verch Evan, was 40. He had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Jonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Hen. He died in his hometown.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Philip, Lord Cilsant Phillipesが1415年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philipは35歳，母Gwendolena Verch Evanは40歳であった。彼はJonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Henとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Philip, Lord Cilsant Phillipes(이)가 1415년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwendolena Verch Evan(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Jonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Hen(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Philip, Lord Cilsant Phillipes родился в 1415 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwendolena Verch Evan, 40.
